description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style coupe car with a rounded, streamlined body painted in a creamy white color. The car features two bold racing stripes, one red and one blue, running from the front hood to the rear, giving it a sporty appearance. The front end is characterized by large, round headlights and a simple, curved bumper, while the rear is smooth with minimal detailing. The side profile reveals two doors, blacked-out windows, and classic wheel arches with dark hubcaps. The roofline is continuous and gently curved, typical of older coupe designs. The overall look is reminiscent of iconic European compact cars, blending retro charm with a playful racing motif.
description: A vintage-style, creamy white coupe car with red and blue racing stripes, rounded body, and two doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded hood, blacked-out windshield, and prominent red and blue racing stripes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, curved roofline, and dark wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back, taillights, and continuation of the racing stripes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door, window, and classic wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
